title: ebenus boissieri
intro: Ebenus boissieri, also known as the Egyptian clover, is a type of perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ebenus boissieri include its ability to help reduce symptoms of arthritis and improve digestive health, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Ebenus boissieri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its purported therapeutic effects.
